demo_timing.narration_start: The same attack concept mutates. Now it arrives at a different mesh node in isiZulu, impersonating SARS.

threat.subject: ISAZISO ESIPHUTHUMAYO: Inkinga nge-akhawunti yakho yentela — isinyathelo sidingeka ngaphambi kuka-17:00

sender.homoglyph_note: Capital I used instead of lowercase l in 'filing' — visually identical in sans-serif fonts

threat.body:
Sawubona Mnumzane Dlamini,

Le ncwadi ivela eMnyangweni Wezentela waseNingizimu Afrika (SARS).

Siqaphelise inkinga enkulu ne-akhawunti yakho yentela (Tax Reference: 9012345678). Ngokombiko wethu, awukhokhanga intela yakho yekota yesithathu ka-2024/25, futhi isamba esilinganiselwa kuR187,500.00 sisalele.

NgokweSigaba 179 soMthetho Wokuphathwa Kwentela, uma ungathathi isinyathelo ngaphambi kuka-17:00 namhlanje:

• Izimpahla zakho zingavinjelwa (asset seizure)
• I-akhawunti yakho yasebhange ingamiswa (account freeze)
• Ungabekwa icala lobugebengu (criminal prosecution)

Ukuze uxazulule le nkinga ngokushesha, sicela uvakashele isixhumanisi esilandelayo futhi ufake imininingwane yakho ye-eFiling:

https://sars-efiling-verification.co.za/compliance/urgent/2025

NOMA

Ungashayela ucingo inombolo yethu ekhethekile: 0800-SARS-NOW (0800-7277-669)
Sebenzisa inombolo yakho yereferensi: SARS-URG-2025-SD-4478

Sicela wazi ukuthi SARS inelungelo elinqunyiwe ngumthetho lokuthatha izinyathelo ngaphandle kwesaziso esengeziwe.

Ngenhlonipho,

Nkosikazi Nomvula Khumalo
Umphathi Omkhulu: Ukuthobelwa Kwentela
South African Revenue Service
Gordon Sobukwe Building, Pretoria
Ucingo: +27 12 422 4000

Lesi isaziso esisemthethweni esenziwe ngaphansi koMthetho Wokuphathwa Kwentela, 2011. Uma usitholile ngephutha, sicela usisuse masinyane.
threat.body_english_gloss:
Good day Mr Dlamini,

This letter comes from the South African Revenue Service (SARS).

We have noticed a serious problem with your tax account (Tax Reference: 9012345678). According to our records, you have not paid your third quarter tax for 2024/25, and an estimated amount of R187,500.00 is outstanding.

In terms of Section 179 of the Tax Administration Act, if you do not take action before 17:00 today:

• Your assets may be seized
• Your bank account may be frozen
• You may face criminal prosecution

To resolve this matter urgently, please visit the following link and enter your eFiling details:

https://sars-efiling-verification.co.za/compliance/urgent/2025

OR

Call our special number: 0800-SARS-NOW (0800-7277-669)
Use your reference number: SARS-URG-2025-SD-4478

Please be aware that SARS has legal right to take action without further notice.

Respectfully,

Mrs Nomvula Khumalo
Senior Manager: Tax Compliance
South African Revenue Service
Gordon Sobukwe Building, Pretoria
Phone: +27 12 422 4000

This is an official notice made under Tax Administration Act, 2011. If you received it in error, please delete it immediately.

social_engineering_markers.authority: Impersonates SARS — most feared government institution in South Africa. Real building name, real phone format.
social_engineering_markers.urgency: Action required before 17:00 TODAY or face asset seizure, account freeze, criminal prosecution
social_engineering_markers.fear: Three escalating legal consequences — seizure, freeze, prosecution
social_engineering_markers.legitimacy_anchors: Real Tax Administration Act section (179 is real), real SARS building (Gordon Sobukwe), realistic tax reference format, official language tone
social_engineering_markers.cultural_context: In South Africa, SARS has extraordinary legal powers including garnishee orders without court approval. This is REAL and widely known, making the threat highly credible to South African targets.

expected_results.code_switch_details: isiZulu body with English legal/financial terms (Tax Reference, asset seizure, eFiling, criminal prosecution)

mitre_mapping.T1036.005: Masquerading: Match Legitimate Name or Location

expected_results.bridge_defense_description: Classified as VARIANT (5.1 bits). Analogical bridge fused existing BEC antibody with government-phishing nearest neighbor. Blocked without full synthesis.

demo_narration.on_submit: The same attack CONCEPT mutates and hits a different node — now in isiZulu, impersonating SARS. This is what happens in real campaigns: attackers adapt language and authority figure to target.
demo_narration.on_detection: Surprise score: 5.1 bits — VARIANT. IMMUNIS recognizes family resemblance to Sesotho BEC. It does not need full synthesis.
demo_narration.on_bridge: Bridge defense activates — it fuses existing antibody with a government-phishing template. Blocked in under 2 seconds. No human intervention.
demo_narration.mind_blow: This node was NEVER directly attacked with this variant. It inherited partial immunity from the mesh and adapted. This is herd immunity.
